message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam sequenceParticipant underline false

participant Dispatcher as Dispatcher
participant JobManagerRunner_JobMaster as JobManagerRunner_JobMaster
participant SchedulerNG as SchedulerNG

Dispatcher -> JobManagerRunner_JobMaster : jobManagerRunnerFactory.createJobManagerRunner
JobManagerRunner_JobMaster -> SchedulerNG : SlotPoolServiceSchedulerFactory.createScheduler
@enduml
